title: Wheeze
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

red_flags.text: Supports sudden or severe breathing difficulty, cardiac or chest symptoms, cyanosis, inability to speak full sentences, confusion or agitation, stridor or audible wheeze, immobility or trauma, orthopnoea, status asthmaticus, and near-fatal asthma history as clinician-assessed prompts.
red_flags.rationale: Supports mapped severe-breathlessness, chest-symptom, stridor, respiratory-distress, cyanosis, and safety fields as prompts only.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports sudden or severe breathing difficulty, cardiac or chest symptoms, cyanosis, inability to speak full sentences, confusion or agitation, stridor or audible wheeze, immobility or trauma, orthopnoea, status asthmaticus, and near-fatal asthma history as clinician-assessed prompts.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Asthma – 38

red_flags.text: Supports review of symptoms, time off work or school, reliever use, systemic steroid courses, admissions or emergency attendance, validated control questionnaires, peak flow, FeNO, adherence, inhaler technique, smoking or vaping, occupational, psychosocial, seasonal and environmental factors, and response to treatment change.
red_flags.rationale: Was reviewed for chronic symptom and response context; no duplicate item is mapped.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports review of symptoms, time off work or school, reliever use, systemic steroid courses, admissions or emergency attendance, validated control questionnaires, peak flow, FeNO, adherence, inhaler technique, smoking or vaping, occupational, psychosocial, seasonal and environmental factors, and response to treatment change.

examination.text: Supports wheeze, cough, breathlessness, chest tightness, variation, nocturnal or seasonal pattern, triggers, exercise and occupational context, atopy or family history, bronchodilator response, respiratory examination, peak flow, and objective confirmation.
examination.rationale: Supports mapped wheeze identity, duration, episodic pattern, triggers, cough, breathlessness, chest tightness, inhaler and bronchodilator-response context, nocturnal symptoms, respiratory examination, peak flow, presets, and history.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports wheeze, cough, breathlessness, chest tightness, variation, nocturnal or seasonal pattern, triggers, exercise and occupational context, atopy or family history, bronchodilator response, respiratory examination, peak flow, and objective confirmation.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Asthma – 38

examination.text: Supports wheeze, cough, breathlessness, chest tightness, symptom variation, nocturnal or seasonal pattern, triggers, atopy and family history, occupational context, respiratory examination, peak flow, FeNO, spirometry, and objective confirmation.
examination.rationale: Corroborates mapped wheeze, symptom, examination, peak-flow, and spirometry fields; no duplicate item is mapped.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports wheeze, cough, breathlessness, chest tightness, symptom variation, nocturnal or seasonal pattern, triggers, atopy and family history, occupational context, respiratory examination, peak flow, FeNO, spirometry, and objective confirmation.

source_limitations: Wheeze has causes beyond asthma and the legacy workflow does not enforce the exact source populations or setting.
Hemoptysis, oxygen-below-baseline, silent chest, generic medication plans, symptom diary, fixed follow-up, PRN wording, and generic clinician plans remain unsupported.
Diagnosis, objective-test interpretation, treatment choice, medicine dosing, emergency disposition, and qualified clinician review remain clinician responsibilities.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
